classes.name: python.oned.AmptekOneDCtrl.AmptekOneDCtrl
documentation:
This class is the OneD controller for the Amptek detector.
It works as slave of the AmptekPX5CoTiCtrl, which prepares and
starts the acquisition.

classes.name: python.countertimer.AmptekPX5CoTiCtrl.AmptekPX5SoftCounterTimerController
documentation:
This class is the AmptekPX5 Sardana CounterTimerController.
Its first channel is an acquisition timer.
It is used to preset the acquisition time.
Its second channel is a Fast Counter (Incoming Count Rate ICR).
It counts all the incoming events.
Its third channel is a Slow Counter (Total Count Rate TCR).
Any event that is counted in the spectrum is also counter here.
Rest of the channels are software ROI of the spectrum - so called SCAs.

classes.name: python.twod.AndorIkon.AndorIkonCtrl

methods.name: python.twod.AndorIkon.AndorIkonCtrl.LoadOne
documentation: by ar: current implentation (or detector/sdk) does not allow
for stop the acq whiting a single exposure (e.g to abort
an exposure which was accidentally started with 1000s).
Whether this is offered by another call to SDK or not in unclear.
Also in startacq mode, stop acq is blocked by waitforbuffer()
and thus aborts the continious sequence acq only on return on

This class is the Tango Sardana Two D controller
for the Andor Ikon (-M and -L) detector

functions.name: python.twod.EigerDectris.findDB
documentation:
handle these cases:
  - tangoHost == None: use TANGO_HOST DB
  - tangoHost == "haspp99:10000" return db link
  - tangoHost == "haspp99" insert 100000 and return db link
